## Checklist

- [ ] `zig build test` green in all four optimize modes (Debug, ReleaseSafe, ReleaseFast, ReleaseSmall)
- [ ] `zig fmt --check .` clean
- [ ] New code meets the test-coverage bar in CONTRIBUTING.md

- [ ] No new secret-dependent branches or indexing; secrets wiped
